description: Determine the UTC transit time of the Orion Nebula (M42) from a remote observatory in Mayhill, NM (32.903° N, 105.528° W, Altitude: 2200m) on November 15, 2024, to schedule a telescope meridian flip. Capture a screenshot showing M42 at its transit point. Create a session automation plan at ~/Desktop/meridian_flip_plan.txt containing the target name (M42 or Orion), the date (Nov 15, 2024), and the determined UTC transit time.

metadata.data_source: NASA JPL Horizons ephemeris system, Stellarium built-in catalogs
